banner.text: Fableris is now available on Android!

news.title: Fableris is in a 14-day testing phase
Welcome to Fableris
news.text: Fableris is officially launched! Free stories await you, with unique universes and dozens of different endings. Have a great adventure.

news.title: Many free stories available
news.text: Project Lazarus, The Theatre of Carcosa, The Butcher's Dreams, The Last Minutes, The Last Round and The Station of Regrets, and more! — all free, all playable right now.

news.title: StoryForge — Create your stories
news.text: The StoryForge visual editor is available for everyone. Create your own interactive story, test it, and submit it for official publication.

news.title: New free stories and a new DLC available
news.text: A new DLC accompanied by free stories!
